items.title: GitHub Copilot web chat drops all Gemini models and two GPT variants
Claude Code ships /code-review command, agent view, and Windows reliability fixes
items.caveats: GitHub release page displayed May 21 2025; version sequence confirms 2026-05-21

items.title: Anthropic projects first operating profit ($559M) as SpaceX S-1 discloses compute deal terms ($1.25B/month)
items.methodology: financial disclosure via investor briefing + SEC S-1 filing
items.caveats: WSJ primary paywalled; Q2 profit timing coincides with promotional May-June compute pricing

items.title: White House AI executive order signing postponed by Trump
OpenAI prepares confidential IPO filing targeting September 2026 listing
items.caveats: Filing not confirmed as submitted; timing described as fluid

items.title: Amazon commits $33 billion to AI and cloud infrastructure across Southeast Asia through 2039
Hark raises $700M Series A at $6B valuation for AI hardware and model platform
items.caveats: No product shipping; first models planned summer 2026

items.title: Anthropic expands AI moral formation research, tests ethical-reminder tool in Claude development
items.caveats: Internal evaluation not independently replicated; COI — Anthropic discussing own alignment work

limitations: Anthropic Q2 profitability primary (WSJ) paywalled; using TechCrunch secondary
Claude Code release date uncertainty: GitHub showed 2025, version sequence confirms 2026
Login-walled coverage: X timeline, Instagram, LinkedIn, Discord not accessed
Toto 2.0 window ambiguity: blog May 14 (outside), arXiv May 19 (inside); conservative decision to drop
workflow-automation category thin: no new end-user autonomous agent product at GA
mcp-ecosystem category thin: no notable new MCP servers in window
Chinese vendor coverage gap: Alibaba, Baidu, DeepSeek not specifically searched
